info.title: micro NX Save Sync
info.author: prodeveloper0
info.description: Sync save data between multiple devices
info.details: uNX Save Sync (aka. uNSS) is a Nintendo Switch application that allows synchronization of save data between multiple devices through a central remote server.

changelog:
* Support creating title's save data file system. Now don't need to run game first time to restore save data.
* Support title probing policies (when restore, when archive)
* Support title exclusion filter by ID or name
* Support profile selection in applet 
* Support profile selector applet in full memory application
* Support fallback account name to run on applet mode
